title: Empire Weekly Planner and Menu Board for Kitchen, Work Planner Blackboard, Wall Mounted Daily Planner with a Pen, To Do List, Dry Erase Meal Planner with White Cloth for Office & Home (Standard, Grey)
features: EASY TO WIPE OFF: The Empire weekly planner is made of dry erase film. This menu chalkboard monthly calendar can be cleaned up with ease. This student planner can be easily cleaned, dip the cloth into the water, squeeze it and then wipe the board

STAIN RESISTANT: This weekly planner blackboard has improved stain-resistant technology. Unlike all those cheaply-made dry erase planners that leave irritating stains, this erasable work planner cleans up easily without any mark

MULTIFUNCTIONAL VERSATILE CALENDAR: The Empire weekly planner blackboard makes it simple to plan, schedule, and organise your daily activities, jobs, and business objectives. The screws and the hanging rope are included in the packing, this monthly planner chalkboard can be mounted on the wall of your kitchen, schools and offices

NO MORE HASSLE: The Empire daily planner helps you record your kitchen family shopping list, weekly planning, menu and memo, ideal for your home message notice and make sure that everyone knows their responsibilities during the week. This organiser planner helps you keep track of your week’s chores with zero hassle
QUALITY ASSURED: We strive to create products that stand out from the crowd caring about your experience and satisfaction. We can guarantee you and your family a safe choice of premium quality.
description: Complete customer satisfaction is our main concern. Therefore, we work in close contact with our clients throughout the entire cycle to provide you with the highest-quality products SPECIFICATIONS: ✅ Pack Measurements: 44cm × 33cm × 4.5cm ✅ Pack Weight: 0.85 kg ✅ Total Items Per Pack: 5 (1 Weekly Planner + 1 Pen + 1 Cleaning Cloth + Screws + Rope) ✅ Weekly Planner Material: Wood ✅ Weekly Planner Size: Standard ✅ Weekly Planner Colour: Grey ✅ Pen Colour: Black with White ink ✅ Fixture Type: Rope
